name: Glyph
notes: Root->128 accuracy audit pass (#5903): resolved a prior identity-dispute flag (native chain name was a placeholder; TaoMarketCap and Tensorplex disagreed on the SN117 source repository, with the file previously tracking a BrainPlay/shiftlayer-llc identity). The on-chain SubnetIdentitiesV3 record now shows a complete, professional Glyph Research identity (subnetName "glyph", live website, real contact email, Discord link, description "decentralized Hutter Prize") that did not exist at the last review. The official glyph-research/glyph-subnet repository's README explicitly and consistently documents --netuid 117 for mainnet across every command example (the brainplay-subnet repo's --netuid 335 references are all under --subtensor.network test, i.e. testnet, not a mainnet claim on the same netuid). Re-slugged this file from brainplay.json to glyph.json to match. Removed the BrainPlay-specific surfaces (health API, Codenames deployment profile, leaderboard dashboard) since they belong to a different, no-longer-associated tenant rather than a degraded version of the current one; added Glyph's official website and source repository.

surfaces.name: Glyph website
